headline: MT Stock Hits 52-Week High: What's Driving Its Performance?

headline: IFF to Optimize Portfolio With Its Food Ingredients Business Sale
summary: International Flavors sells its Food Ingredients unit as part of a portfolio overhaul, aiming to cut debt and focus on higher-growth, innovation-led segments.

headline: NEXA Resumes Cajamarquilla Smelter Operations After Fire Incident
summary: Nexa Resources resumes Cajamarquilla smelter operations after a fire, with zinc production lines restarting and lost output expected to be recovered in 2026.

raw.headline: NEXA Resumes Cajamarquilla Smelter Operations After Fire Incident

headline: DOW Launches DOWSIL TC-3120 Thermal Gel for Advanced Electronics
summary: Dow rolls out DOWSIL TC-3120 Thermal Gel, aiming to boost heat management and optical-grade cleanliness for next-gen 800G/1.6T modules.

headline: Reasons Why You Should Hold Nutrien Stock in Your Portfolio Now
